attributes.action: Change the law about cruelty to animals
attributes.background: Anyone who is found to have let an animal suffer/die should always serve a prison sentence. Not a suspended sentence or a ban on keeping animals.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petitions, which call for similar action:

Stronger penalties for animal cruelty and stricter regulations on animal sales
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/740729

Introduce custodial minimum sentences for animal cruelty offences
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/743142
